p2p_enrich.notes: Enriched with 3 additional p2p repo_tests: test_repo_data_table_inflection_tests (inflection.test.ts), test_repo_data_table_operators_tests (operators.test.ts), test_repo_data_schema_unit_tests (data-schema tests). CI commands verified: pnpm lint, pnpm format:check, pnpm changes:validate, pnpm typecheck, pnpm --filter @remix-run/data-table typecheck, node --test (table.test.ts, inflection.test.ts, operators.test.ts, data-schema tests)

validate.notes: Fixed solve.sh to use git checkout instead of cherry-pick (avoids conflicts). Added pnpm install and prettier formatting to solve.sh. Fixed test_outputs.py to use relative imports for data-schema package (./packages/data-schema/src/index.ts instead of @remix-run/data-schema) to resolve module resolution issues in test environment. All 17 tests pass on gold image, NOP correctly fails on base commit. Rubric ICR is 0.40 due to strict formatting/structure rules, but actual functionality is correct per pytest.
